Spotify has all music,gives you the remastered albums and singles when you look at a person discography so you don’t get something old and if you need too you can just search it up. They have a radio or a mix or something in that realm for everything. You can search up a song you like then put radio after it and Spotify will give you it. There’s amazing podcast, you can speed them up or slow them down. They can go from 0.1-3.5 speed. They have a mode where you can see the music video for the songs you have. They also let you customize your playlist like you can make your own cover with like and image and some special font and things of that sort. You can download songs so you can listen to them anywhere. You can have tons of songs in the platform. They have special things you can press to see top videos or songs. They also have Spotify wrapped and its statistics for your listening. You can also see every one who made the song. Overall Spotify is the best and if you complain about adds, get over it every app has it and Spotify has videos too so it has more features than any other listening platform. That’s why Spotify is the G.O.A.T.

metadata.title: My favourite music app for years.

review_text: Spotify is great, if your willing to fork over a bunch of money. The pros are: it has loads of songs to play, it remembers what you like, & it not only has music but podcasts and audiobooks. The cons are: if you don’t want to pay loads there are frequent adverts, you can’t always choose what you listen to, you can’t listen to certain things eg. Podcasts and audiobooks, it adds stuff to your playlist without you being able to remove them, a shuffle that you can’t control and if you don’t want that then you can pay something that should be free to the rich and on top of that they delete your recently looked up after only 29 songs So in conclusion they are lucky to get 3 stars

metadata.title: Deletes music non stop for know reason and doesn’t download any more

review_text: Spotify is a great app for music. I use it basically everyday for hours at a time with no issue. My one problem with it is that the amount of ads on the free version is ridiculous. It’s basically every four or five songs you get three ads. And I would get premium but that’s also ridiculously priced for individual plans. All I wish is that there is fewer ads and we get more than six skips an hour (I go through six skips in like 1 minute).

Love the app but the shuffling feature needs to be fixed still. I feel like I always listen to the same artist in my playlists for several songs before it changes to a different artist. Just for it to do the same thing over and over again.

Spotify used to be great, but now I’m finding the app incredibly confusing. There are so many tabs, and some of them seem to appear more than once. I also have to scroll endlessly through album icons that I never selected. I’m talking pages and pages of them. The user experience is a mess. And what the hell is the new icon anyway? When I search for something, I get endless results that have nothing to do with what I’m looking for. Classical music is especially a nightmare. If a piece has more than one movement, I have to click on every single track just to hear it or see the full title before I can choose the one I want. The only reason I’m still using Spotify is because I’ve built playlists over the last 10 years. Ironically, those playlists are so hard to find that I can spend the first three minutes in the app just trying to locate them. I’d much rather see my own playlist icons than random miscellaneous junk I don’t care about. It would be so nice if the app were simpler, cleaner, and actually useful. Spotify, we can do better.
